programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: The F4 guys have moved on to college while Jan Di has entered her senior year of high school. She has not heard from Jun Pyo since he left.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di waits to hear the conclusions of F3's meeting with Jun-pyo, and can tell from their look that it was not good.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: After treating Jan Di in a cruel manner, Mr. Jung prepares everything so that Jun-Pyo can visit her in Seoul. Will he be able to go without Madam Kang finding out?

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's family hears about Jun-pyo's engagement and asks her miserably if it's true.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Ji-hoo can see how hurt Jan Di is by the kiss, and continues to follow her as she stumbles around in shock.

programme.title: I Remember
programme.desc: The intense experience of a woman and her family as they come to terms with the early onset of Alzheimer's disease.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begins seeing Jae-Kyung in a new light, like he's seeing her for the first time as a potential friend -- or maybe a kindred spirit.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Woo-bin tries to talk some sense into Yi-jung, who is determined to drink himself into a stupor.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: At home, Jun-hee reminisces about how her mother meddled in her life, in much the same way she's interfering in Jun-pyo's now.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung is waiting outside for Eun-jae, excited to see her -- until he listens in on her phone conversation; from her words, it sounds like a call to a boyfriend.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begs for Jan Di to advise him not to get married.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo tells Jan Di that he'll protect her, but to Jun-pyo's surprise, she says that she does not want to be cosseted or taken care of.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Perhaps feeling it's time to expose one truth, Mr. Jung leads Jun-hee to the unknown patient's bedside; at the sight of her father, Jun-hee breaks down.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo asks Yumi to make the lunchbox once more, confirming that Yumi had taken credit for her lunch.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Just being rich isn't enough to endure the teen oppression at Shinhwa -- loners are often marked as targets by the bored über-clique called F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A wicked rumor is spread on the Internet that a second-year student at Shinhwa High School is pregnant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Not too eager to watch Jan Di dancing with one of his best friends, Jun Pyo exits the ballroom and ends up taking out his frustrations by the poolside.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Making a rash choice, Jan Di tells her mother she has to go somewhere and runs off, heading toward Namsan Tower.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's bike is set ablaze while she is attacked with water balloons and blasted with a fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A psychic foresees that Jan Di will be losing something significant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun Pyo intends to expel his best friend and Jan Di out of Shinhwa High School -- and out of F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di dashes to the hospital after being informed that Jun Pyo had been in an accident.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung gets a frantic call from his mother threatening to commit suicide because of his father.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi Jung's mother frantically calls him threatening to commit suicide.

programme.title: Hello, Goodbye
programme.desc: Aoi and Hazuka are classmates, but they are not friends. The two girls meet an elderly woman who wants to give a love letter to her first love. Hazuka and Aoi try to find her first love.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A note indicates that class has been moved to the science lab. The lab is unoccupied, but Jan Di waits, not realizing that the room is filling with fumes.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Ji-hoo can see how hurt Jan Di is by the kiss, and continues to follow her as she stumbles around in shock.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begins seeing Jae-Kyung in a new light, like he's seeing her for the first time as a potential friend -- or maybe a kindred spirit.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Woo-bin tries to talk some sense into Yi-jung, who is determined to drink himself into a stupor.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: At home, Jun-hee reminisces about how her mother meddled in her life, in much the same way she's interfering in Jun-pyo's now.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung is waiting outside for Eun-jae, excited to see her -- until he listens in on her phone conversation; from her words, it sounds like a call to a boyfriend.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begs for Jan Di to advise him not to get married.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo tells Jan Di that he'll protect her, but to Jun-pyo's surprise, she says that she does not want to be cosseted or taken care of.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Perhaps feeling it's time to expose one truth, Mr. Jung leads Jun-hee to the unknown patient's bedside; at the sight of her father, Jun-hee breaks down.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo asks Yumi to make the lunchbox once more, confirming that Yumi had taken credit for her lunch.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Just being rich isn't enough to endure the teen oppression at Shinhwa -- loners are often marked as targets by the bored über-clique called F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A wicked rumor is spread on the Internet that a second-year student at Shinhwa High School is pregnant.

programme.title: Two on the Edge
programme.desc: Otose Nishizono ages out of the orphanage system on her 18th birthday and begins a new life in her apartment.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Not too eager to watch Jan Di dancing with one of his best friends, Jun Pyo exits the ballroom and ends up taking out his frustrations by the poolside.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Making a rash choice, Jan Di tells her mother she has to go somewhere and runs off, heading toward Namsan Tower.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's bike is set ablaze while she is attacked with water balloons and blasted with a fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A psychic foresees that Jan Di will be losing something significant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun Pyo intends to expel his best friend and Jan Di out of Shinhwa High School -- and out of F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di dashes to the hospital after being informed that Jun Pyo had been in an accident.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung gets a frantic call from his mother threatening to commit suicide because of his father.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi Jung's mother frantically calls him threatening to commit suicide.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A note indicates that class has been moved to the science lab. The lab is unoccupied, but Jan Di waits, not realizing that the room is filling with fumes.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's father gets kidnapped by loan sharks, which inevitably forces Jan Di's mother to swallow her pride and plead for Madam Kang's help.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: The F4 guys have moved on to college while Jan Di has entered her senior year of high school. She has not heard from Jun Pyo since he left.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di waits to hear the conclusions of F3's meeting with Jun-pyo, and can tell from their look that it was not good.

programme.desc: A company majority-owned by billionaire Vincent Bolloré's Bolloré Group and Hubert Fabri is the subject of allegations of labor abuses at some of its African rubber plantations, including by female workers who say they were forced to engage in sex.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.sub-title: How NFL Legend Steve Young Built a $10 Billion Fund
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly speak with Steve Young about his journey from NFL stardom to managing a $10 billion fund, discussing the challenges and lessons learned along the way.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.sub-title: AJ Andrews on Growing Baseball's Audience
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with AJ Andrews on baseball's momentum, softball's growth and why storytelling and authenticity are key to building the next generation of fans.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.sub-title: Alan Waxman Is a Sports Superinvestor
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with Sixth Street's Alan Waxman about taking a stake in the New England Patriots, international growth in the NBA and why a historic NWSL expansion fee paid off.

programme.sub-title: Jess Pegula on the Business of Tennis

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.sub-title: The CEO Behind Barstool Sports & Food52
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit with Erika Ayers Baden, former chief executive of Barstool Sports and current CEO of Food52, to discuss navigating turnarounds and how setbacks can fuel growth.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.sub-title: How Jerry Jones Built a Cowboys Empire
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly interview Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones on risk-taking, making bold trades and the Main Street philosophy that fueled his rise with the Cowboys.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.sub-title: Principles With Bill Belichick and Ray Dalio
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit for a special conversation with two titans, football coach Bill Belichick and Bridgewater founder Ray Dalio, to learn their guiding principles for success.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.sub-title: The Deadly Quest for Gold in South Africa
programme.desc: Gold built South Africa, but mining kills some who dig for it; in Stilfontein, a disaster that trapped miners underground reveals how a quest for gold became a story of hunger, survival and death.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.sub-title: The Scandal That Rocked the Philippines
programme.desc: A police raid in a small Philippine town reveals a young mayor's alleged links to a $2 billion Singapore money laundering scandal and Chinese espionage.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission is supposed to root out graft; instead, some of its members have been accused of perpetuating the very wrongdoing they were meant to stop.

A man (Anthony Hopkins) searches for his missing daughter in one of several vignettes dealing with issues of love, loss and betrayal.

programme.title: Ultrasound
programme.desc: Driving home during a rainstorm, Glen experiences car trouble and gets help from a strange couple that gives him an offer he can't refuse. At the same time, Katie is feeling weighed down by a secret and a medical practitioner questions an experiment.

programme.title: High-Rise
programme.desc: A doctor (Tom Hiddleston) moves into a London skyscraper where rising tensions and class warfare lead to anarchy.

programme.title: Higher Power
programme.desc: With the world on the brink of destruction, a maniacal scientist kidnaps a man's family and uses him as an unwilling test subject to save the planet.

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A photojournalist must bring his publisher's daughter along when his latest assignment takes him into an area populated by vicious alien beasts.

programme.title: The Windigo
programme.desc: A Native American teenager and his grandmother resurrect an ancient demon to protect their family from backwoods meth dealers. However, they soon discover that the creature's lust for killing can't be controlled.

programme.title: Hobo With a Shotgun
programme.desc: Hoping for heaven but finding an urban hell, a homeless man (Rutger Hauer) takes aim at a crime boss and the man's sadistic sons (Gregory Smith, Nick Bateman).

programme.title: Funhouse
programme.desc: Down-and-out backup singer and celebrity ex-husband Kasper is invited to compete in the Funhouse, an online reality show.

programme.title: Storage 24
programme.desc: A group of friends are stalked through a grueling maze of claustrophobic corridors by a terrifying, tentacle-faced creature that eviscerates its victims.

programme.title: Tiger House
programme.desc: A young gymnast (Kaya Scodelario) battles a group of bank robbers at the home of her boyfriend.

programme.title: Pusher I
programme.desc: Frank's life as a drug dealer is perfect until the police catch him while he's delivering heroin. Just before he is arrested, he dumps the smack. Although the police release him, his troubles are just beginning when the buyer demands his money back.

programme.title: The Vanquisher
programme.desc: CIA agent Gunja has to fight operatives who are trying to kill her, then after two years of lying low, she comes out of hiding to foil a bomb plot.

programme.title: The Warlords
programme.desc: In the midst of the Taiping Rebellion of the 1860s, three men take an oath to and blood brothers, pledging loyalty to one another until death, but soon become embroiled in a web of political deceit.

programme.title: All Good Things
programme.desc: The marriage between the heir (Ryan Gosling) to a real-estate fortune and a woman (Kirsten Dunst) of modest means goes south after the husband returns to work for his demanding father.

programme.title: You Are Not My Mother
programme.desc: In a North Dublin housing estate, Char's mother goes missing. When she returns, Char is determined to uncover the truth of her disappearance and unearth the dark secrets of her family.

programme.title: Ip Man: Kung Fu Master
programme.desc: Framed for the murder of a ruthless but honorable mobster, Ip Man becomes targeted for vengeance by his dangerous daughter. Forced to resign as police captain, Ip must also contend with the arrival of the Japanese army in Guangzhou, China.

programme.title: Honeymoon
programme.desc: A honeymooning bride (Rose Leslie) goes sleepwalking into the woods surrounding a secluded cabin. When she returns she looks the same, but something about her is frighteningly different.

programme.title: Agnes
programme.desc: Two priests travel to a convent when a nun shows signs of demonic possession.

programme.title: Censor
programme.desc: A British film censor links a disturbing horror movie to her sister's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Playback
programme.desc: When a cop investigates the case of a missing local teen, he discovers a dark secret has been unleashed and an evil spirit is threatening everyone in his town.

programme.title: Flawless
programme.desc: A janitor (Michael Caine) convinces a frustrated executive (Demi Moore) to help him steal gems from their employer, the London Diamond Corp.

programme.title: Headhunters
programme.desc: A corporate recruiter (Aksel Hennie), who moonlights as an art thief, plans to steal a valuable painting from the perfect candidate (Nikolaj Coster-Waldau) for a job he needs to fill.

programme.title: Sushi Girl
programme.desc: Released from prison, a thief (Noah Hathaway) joins his partners (Tony Todd, James Duval) in crime for a tension-filled dinner that involves a naked woman.

programme.title: The Protector 2
programme.desc: Martial artist Kham must rescue his beloved elephant from poachers and thwart a plot to start a war.

programme.title: Fay Grim
programme.desc: A CIA agent convinces a woman to begin a globe-trotting quest to retrieve the journals of her presumed-dead husband.

programme.title: Grand Piano
programme.desc: A concert pianist who has stage fright finds a threatening note written on his sheet music just moments before a performance.

programme.title: Ragnarok
programme.desc: A Norwegian archaeologist uncovers mysterious runes describing Ragnarök, the Viking legend of the end of the world, and accidentally awakens a giant monster.

programme.title: The Hunter
programme.desc: A shadowy corporation sends a mercenary (Willem Dafoe) to Tasmania to track down a nearly extinct tiger whose genetic code holds the secret to a dangerous weapon.

programme.title: Frontera
programme.desc: After crossing the border illegally, a Mexican worker (Michael Peña) is accused of murdering the wife of a former U.S. lawman (Ed Harris).

programme.title: Blackthorn
programme.desc: Leaving Bolivia and heading back to the U.S., the outlaw formerly known as Butch Cassidy (Sam Shepard) has a final adventure.

programme.title: Body at Brighton Rock
programme.desc: A part-time state park employee faces her worst fears as she guards the site of a potential crime scene deep in the wilderness.

programme.title: Compliance
programme.desc: A fast-food worker (Dreama Walker) who's accused of theft is put through the wringer as her boss (Ann Dowd), at the direction of a phone caller who says he's a cop, subjects her to increasingly harsh forms of interrogation.

programme.title: Satanic
programme.desc: Terror awaits some friends after they meet a dangerous young woman from a Los Angeles cult.

programme.title: Donkey Punch
programme.desc: Young British vacationers come unglued when one of their number is killed while shooting an impromptu porn video on their yacht.

programme.title: The Perfect Host
programme.desc: A crook on the run cons his way into a dinner party whose host is anything but ordinary.

programme.title: Borderline
programme.desc: A helplessly romantic sociopath escapes from a mental institution and invades the home of a '90s pop superstar. He just wants to be loved; she just wants to survive.

programme.title: The Ones Below
programme.desc: After giving birth to her first child, a woman (Clémence Poésy) starts to believe that her downstairs neighbors have sinister intentions.

programme.title: Amulet
programme.desc: Terror strikes when a former soldier takes a job to help a young woman and her housebound mother.

programme.title: Splinter
programme.desc: A vacationing couple and an escaped convict become trapped by a voracious parasite that devours its victims from the inside out.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel está dispuesto a llegar hasta las últimas consecuencias para rescatar a Julia. Camila por fin descubre su pasado, pero no quiere que Max lo sepa. Julia por fin regresa al lado de su familia pero Ezequiel asesinó a Marcos.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Camila recibe otro mensaje de El Doliente. La madre de Isabel recibe una llamada que cambia su estado de ánimo. Max y Ezequiel son interrogados en la comisaría para averiguar si Marcos realmente se suicidó o fue Ezequiel quien lo asesinó.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Camila por fin decide contarle toda la verdad de su pasado a Max. Astrid intenta seducir a Max. Camila no está de acuerdo con la relación de Yelly y el hijo de Fausto Aragón. Camila le cuenta a Max que su madre la abandonó en la calle sin razón.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Camila está preocupada porque Roberto ha aparecido nuevamente en su vida. Camila le dice a Max que ya no pueden seguir así y está decidida a contarle toda la verdad. Camila le dice al Padre Tiziano que tiene miedo de lo que puede hacerle Rodrigo.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Roberto amenaza a Camila con contarle toda la verdad a Max. Astrid le confiesa a Max que está decidida a dejarlo en paz. Max toma una gran decisión, terminar con Camila y el gran amor que siente por ella. El caso de Marcos es cerrado por un juez.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Roberto enfrenta a Max y le dice que Camila es suya. Max le ofrece disculpas a Astrid. Julia y Gregorio están dispuestos a defender su amor a toda costa. Camila tiene miedo de ir a la cárcel y decide enfrentar a Rodrigo.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Eleazar y Candela están a punto de dejarse llevar por el placer de la carne, pero algo los interrumpe.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: La médula de Aurora podría salvar la vida de Tadeo, pero ella desconoce la verdad de su origen. Aurora encara a Rodrigo y le pregunta los motivos para acostarse con François.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: El festejo de nuevo año trae nuevas historias, viejos amores se concretan. Las promesas, los propósitos y los celos también se asoman.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to a picturesque cattle farm in California's Santa Maria Valley, to hear firsthand from a young pitmaster who has uncovered the secrets of real Santa Maria barbecue.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Legend of Louis Mueller's Dino Beef Ribs
programme.desc: Pat visits his close friend Wayne Mueller, third-generation pitmaster of Louis Mueller's BBQ, to learn the ins and outs of his famous dino beef ribs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Secret to Texas-Style Smoked Brisket
programme.desc: Pat and his buddy Leonard Botello use the flavors of the beloved native Post Oak to smoke a perfect Central Texas-style beef brisket.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Pit-Cooked Chicken with Alabama White Sauce
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to Decatur, Alabama to visit a storied institution of barbecue - Big Bob Gibson's. There, he learns the ins, the outs, and the history of a regional delicacy: pit-cooked chicken with Alabama white sauce.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin teams up with fellow pitmasters to showcase the rugged and nuanced tradition of whole-hog cooking, West Tennessee-style.

programme.sub-title: Catching Gulf Coast Redfish and Blue Crabs
programme.desc: Pat visits Houston to go Gulf Bay fishing with chef Chris Shepherd, hoping to catch some redfish and gather a side of blue crabs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat visits Edgar Victoria, known for bringing the street foods of Mexico City to Nashville, to do some live fire cooking out in nature as they prepare one of his favorite dishes - skirt steak tlayuda.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat travels to the Emerald Coast of Destin, Florida, to join his friend Adam Evans on a spearfishing adventure, sourcing fresh fish to cook over live fire.

programme.sub-title: Bluefin Tuna Collars with Chili Pickle Relish
programme.desc: Pat Martin visits chef Adam Perry Lang in Los Angeles, where the pair cook a prized catch castoff cut - Bluefin Tuna collars.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat meets the trio behind Blood Bros BBQ to discover how three childhood friends seamlessly blended their Asian-American culture with the Texas barbecue traditions they grew up with.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: Jamie cooks up a hearty chicken and veg pie, super-satisfying mushroom risotto, beautiful homemade bread and a no-cook chocolatey fridge cake, all for under a buck a plate.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.sub-title: Stove Top Pizza with Caramelized Onions and Peppers
programme.desc: Jamie makes super-simple stuffed chicken thighs and a pizza that doesn't need the oven on. He turns the humble pancake into a showstopping stack of spinach, ham and cheesey gorgeousness.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates the one dish wonder of a casserole with a Cajun chicken tray bake and a vegetable lasagna.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.sub-title: Creamy Chicken Pot Pie and Chocolate Tiramisu
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a midweek traybake of roast veg and Camembert. He turns poached chicken into a creamy chicken & chive pie, serves up his easy green chilli salsa under sizzling butterflied prawns, and finishes it all off with decadent chocolate tiramisù.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.sub-title: Jarred Pepper Pasta and Sheet Pan Brisket
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a speedy jarred-pepper pasta, crispy chicken in baked-bread sauce, and a beef brisket traybake - all prepped in minutes. He makes shelf-raid spiced haricot beans, and rounds it all off with a fast and simple strawberry & balsamic tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a speedy midweek chicken traybake. He shows us cool ways to upgrade salmon, knocks up a shelf-raid quesadilla toastie, and transforms a batch-cook Bolognese into cheesy bread bowls. All finished off with a super simple banoffee tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.desc: Jamie shares a simple salmon dish perfect for a midweek meal, and some no-fuss fish cakes made from tins. He cooks a lamb Madras traybake, as well as a no-cook pasta sauce, and crowns it all off with a hot and crispy ice cream parcel!

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.sub-title: Smash Burger and Creamy Chicken with Mushrooms
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a midweek meal of speedy sweet pea chicken, a juicy Smash burger and a chicken and mushroom rice traybake. He batch-cooks his seven-veg sauce, followed by a spicy fish soup. And finishes off with a perfect pudding of tinned fruit granita.

programme.sub-title: Alpine Lamb Ribs from Siddoway Sheep Company

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.sub-title: Smoked Elk Sandwiches at Juniper Mountain Ranch
programme.desc: Jess and her friend Shaundi Campbell meet up with guides from Juniper Mountain Ranch in southeastern Idaho to cull an elk for her smoked elk sandwiches.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess visits Northstar Bison to learn about the small family-run ranch's breeding and processing operation, then prepares her signature smash burger.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.sub-title: Cylon Rolling Acres Goat Birria Tacos
programme.desc: Jess pitches in at Cylon Rolling Acres as owner Leslie Svacina runs her direct-to-consumer goat meat business.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess and her good friends, Fort Worth pitmaster Joe Riscky and Chef Juan Rodriguez, prepare a traditional barbacoa feast.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.sub-title: Nashville Hot Dove Sliders at Redstone Ranch
programme.desc: Jess and her husband Chris head to their favorite hunting grounds, Redstone Ranch, situated in the heart of the migratory dove flyway.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess heads to Oklahoma, where she takes aim at one of the state's estimated 1.5 million feral hogs. Then, she makes a wild hog sausage roll with jalapeno and cheddar.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.sub-title: Live Fire Venison Backstrap in Oklahoma
programme.desc: With the help of a local Oklahoma guide, Jess sets out to hunt an axis deer, then shares butchery techniques and prepares a delicious backstrap grilled over live fire.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess visits the East Foundation in South Texas to participate in a fast-paced, yet careful and methodical deer capture.

programme.title: Hardcore Carnivore
programme.desc: Jess heads to Wyatt Ranches in South Texas to check out the cattle ranching operation they've been running since 1965.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew butchers a whole pheasant to make yakitori-style skewers and a homemade flatbread, cucumber salad and a mango chutney.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Chicken Fried Deer and Creole Halibut
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares chicken fried axis deer. Next, Chef Zimmern poaches halibut in tomato roux.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Wild Boar Feast: Chorizo with Mussels and Whole Roasted Leg
programme.desc: Wild boar takes center stage! Andrew makes chorizo with mussels, preserved lemon & white wine. Then, he slow-roasts a whole leg over fire, served Southern-style with pickled cherries, glazed onions & mustard sauce.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern transforms wild duck into a simple grilled appetizer inspired by Japanese tataki and then uses the rest of the duck to make open fire duck noodle soup with fresh egg noodles, lots of aromatic herbs, bean sprouts and squeeze of lime.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Boar Ribs and Shrimp and Grits
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern makes a homemade barbecue rub, basting sauce and barbecue sauce for wild boar ribs. Next, chef shares his twist on a classic southern shrimp and grits recipe, adding a side of beautiful wild mushrooms.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Elk Tenderloin Tostadas and Grilled Rack of Ribs
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern highlights lean elk, first crafting classic Mexican tostadas with grilled tenderloin, avocado, and homemade salsa macha. Then, he grills a whole rack of elk, serving it with creamy colcannon, tarragon emulsion, and rosemary charcoal.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Grilled Eggplant Caponata Toast and Crispy Squab Katsu
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern creates an elegant, seared pigeon toast crowned with a Sicilian caponata bursting with grilled eggplant, olives, and capers and a crispy pigeon katsu served with a refreshing shaved cabbage salad and punchy ginger-carrot vinaigrette.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Venison Paillard and Hearty Hunter's Stew
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern showcases venison two ways: a delicate grilled paillard with artichokes and parmesan, and a rich, slow-braised Polish hunter's stew with kielbasa, mushrooms, and sauerkraut. Served with grilled leeks and coal-roasted potatoes.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares Carne Adovada.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Creamy Clam Chowder and Mussels in Spicy Tomato Sauce
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern demystifies cooking clams, mussels and oysters.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares a traditional Northern Italian-style wild boar ragu. Paired with a hearty bowl of pasta. Next, chef Zimmern blackens beautiful crimson filets of steelhead in a screaming hot cast iron pan.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern champions the often-overlooked mackerel with a main salad of pickled filets, charred tomatoes, grilled frisée, and sweet summer peaches. Then, he grills it whole seasoned with caramelized onions, rutabaga mash and charred grapes.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Grilled Turkey Legs, Creamed Greens and Lemon Orzo
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares Grilled Turkey Legs, Creamed Greens and Lemon Orzo.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern showcases quail two ways: classic Southern fried quail with lemon-basil aioli, and as an elevated topping for a traditional open-fire paella, complete with crispy socarrat. He proves this small bird makes an extraordinary dinner.

programme.desc: A futuristic villa built on the edge of a lake in Austria. A cabin perched on the edge of a river. A unique beachside house built into the rock, and in rural England a modern mirrored house, designed to blend into and reflect its rural setting.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: In the Cotswolds, UK, a unique home built into a lake. Lake Ontario, a home that resembles an ocean liner, and then to Portugal, where in land, a ruin has been transformed into a minimalist's dream with a pool concealed in the roof.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A striking modern home has been built out of flint, and then to Switzerland to see a sleek glass residence next to a scenic lake. Deep In the woods in New York State, a far-from-average tree house that serves as a dream getaway for a family of five.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: Head to the Serra Da Mantiqueira Mountains, Brazil, to explore a 2000 square metre, grid shaped family home hidden in nature, then visit a wartime bunker on the Isle of Wight in the UK that's been transformed into an ultra modern home.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A Norwegian mountain cabin that is so remote it is only accessed by helicopter. A family retreat embedded into rocks in the Californian desert. In Brazil, an epic jungle lodge.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: Explore a palatial cliff-top villa complete with indoor and outdoor pools. A remote cliff-top home deep in West Virginia and then uncover a retreat built into rocks on the rural outskirts of Stockholm.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Chrissy's multi-purpose home needs help to be as vibrant as Chrissy and her podcast with Marie, while Raymond has a house to sell that needs staging in a hurry.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Lauren's childhood home needs big help to become the grown up family home for her, Kyle and their two boys, while real estate agent Odane needs expert staging to help his clients sell high, and buy their dream home.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: Venture into the Spanish countryside to explore an enchanting villa. A cliffside retreat that is ultra-modern. In rural Quebec, a cabin that resembles a pair of binoculars perched on a cliff, and finally a woodland retreat in Portugal.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A 300-year-old Scottish ruin that's been brought back to life. In the Sierra Nevada mountain, an angular home built from zinc and glass. In Sardinia a stunning waterfront villa. And in Germany, a wartime bunker that lay abandoned for 70 years.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A futuristic villa built on the edge of a lake in Austria. A cabin perched on the edge of a river. A unique beachside house built into the rock, and in rural England a modern mirrored house, designed to blend into and reflect its rural setting.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Bachelor Kyle's father Jack has helped him renovate his new home, but the backyard is still unusable. To help Kyle throw the ultimate housewarming party, Brian and Sarah build a sexy sports pub, a lounge area and a firepit.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Sham, Ruban and their twin boys aren't using their big, boring backyard. To help this family embrace the great outdoors, Brian and Sarah build a vacation style getaway, with a beach volleyball court and a kid's clubhouse.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Becki, Shawn and their 3 kids just moved from the city to a smaller country home. To extend their living space, Brian and Sarah build a new deck, a fire pit area, and a 3-season living space, in their first ever barn rehab.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Tammy and Sam are so busy, their backyard has fallen into disrepair and their 2 kids never use it. Brian and Sarah bring this yard back to life, and then some, with a new dining and lounge area and a fully functional pool house.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Andrea and David are foodies, but hosting in their "builder basic" yard is no fun. Brian and Sarah make their farm-to-table dreams come true, with a veggie garden, dining room, BBQ zone, and a play space for their 2 kids.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Nicole and Charles have 3 kids, and their neighborhood parties are getting too big for their front porch. So Brian and Sarah add more entertaining space in the backyard, plus a 4-season garage conversion with a nautical theme.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Melissa and Lee's 3 boys need more room for sports, and Mom needs more peace and quiet! So Brian and Sarah turn the underused backyard into a sports court, a new lounge space, and a luxurious, 3-season Mom's retreat.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Jenn and Josh don't have enough space in their semi-detached home to enjoy their hobbies. Brian and Sarah build a stylish lounge space and convert the existing garage into a multipurpose space for crafting and playing guitar.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Marlow, Phil, their 3 small kids, and Phil's parents all live in one crowded house. Brian and Sarah transform their yard into a spectacular space for cooking, entertaining and playing.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Lynna is a single mom with three teenage kids and the time has come for her to have the back garden of her dreams. Brian and Sarah deliver in spades, with a 3 season hang-out, lush new landscaping, and a beautiful greenhouse.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Brian and Sarah build a sun deck, outdoor dining area and a Grecian inspired, 3-season garage conversion.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: H and her tenant Emma are bursting out of their 3-unit home. To help out both landlord and tenants, Brian and Sarah add storage space, plus a common lounge space in the backyard, with some urban inspired design touches.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Matt, Mary and their 2 kids don't use their backyard because the neighboring ravine has taken over. Brian and Sarah face environmental challenges to create a beautiful, entertaining and play space for the whole family to enjoy.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Newlyweds Cheryl and Gavin love their new home, but Cheryl doesn't love the sound of Gavin's woodworking in the garage. Brian and Sarah help by building a dedicated woodshop and some chic new living space in their urban backyard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.sub-title: A Space For Dancing and Hanging
programme.desc: Susan's energetic son, Harrison, has no space to dance at home without getting under his mom's feet. Brian and Sarah build a hang out / dance space for Harrison and create a California-inspired pool and lounge area for Susan.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Love is large but space is tight for Lara & Mike and their 5 children. Brian and Sarah free up space by building an activity-packed tree house and recreation court for the children, with grilling, dining and lounging areas for the whole family.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Andrew and Phil are engaged and homeless. And as they couch-surf their way around the city, these soon-to-be-weds are desperate to find a sprawling downtown home of their own.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: With a baby on the way, Emily and Ken are searching for the perfect suburban home close to family. And since their condo sold more quickly than expected, they're crashing in her sister's basement until they find 'the one'.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Tre and Amanda have been living in a rental for nearly three years, and as the kids get bigger their temporary home is getting smaller. They're ready to find a place of their own and are determined to stay in their exclusive lakefront community.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: In order to cut down on his monster commute, George and Jenn want to move closer to family and friends. And while that's something they both agree on, they're miles apart when it comes to design.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Along with their two little ones, Rave and Michelle are staying with his parents while hunting for the perfect suburban home. And though they're a close-knit family, living under one roof is proving too close for comfort.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Stephanie and Marc are getting frustrated with their house hunt. They've been outbid on a series of properties in the city, and the Property Brothers try to sell them on a radically different approach.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Newlyweds, busy professionals, and animal lovers, Sophie, Tim, and their two dogs are determined to get out of his cramped condo. But with their mile-long wish list, finding a perfect modern property will take a minor miracle.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Along with their two little ones, Rave and Michelle are staying with his parents while hunting for the perfect suburban home. And though they're a close-knit family, living under one roof is proving too close for comfort.

programme.title: Property Brothers

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Newlyweds, busy professionals, and animal lovers, Sophie, Tim, and their two dogs are determined to get out of his cramped condo. But with their mile-long wish list, finding a perfect modern property will take a minor miracle.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.sub-title: Cubanos, Empanadas, & Smoked Beef Rib in Miami
programme.desc: Frankie goes to Miami to sample serious cherry smoked beef rib, three cheese spinach empanadas, and a legendary Cubano sandwich with homemade mustard.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.sub-title: Chiles, Burgers, & Tenderloins in Santa Fe
programme.desc: Frankie heads to Santa Fe investigating New Mexican cuisines eating green chili burgers, poblano chile stews, and sweet blue-corn pancakes.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mamma Mia! Off We Go Again
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to Greece to immerse themselves in the culinary traditions. The taste buddies go island-hopping, keen to learn more about the Mediterranean diet and how the country has one of the healthiest populations in the world.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Go Greek! Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: The boys are in the Greek capital Athens in a vintage VW campervan. This is where high-concept cuisine originated & is still being re-invented, in a city known as the birth place of democracy and the cradle of western civilisation.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: On a mission to taste the worlds best breakfast, the three big egos Gordon, Gino and Fred are venturing out of their comfort zones crossing over the USA boarder into Mexico. They hope to stay out of trouble as they drive their bad boy transporter.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon wants to show Fred & Gino that the food and fresh produce are off the charts! In Las Vegas they indulge in one of the most expensive beef burgers. After a night at the casino they're on the road again to experience the real wild west.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gino & Fred are excited to head to San Francisco for their very own Summer of Love. Gordon tries to embrace the flower power mood, but he's more interested in the 61 Michelin Stars. The boys travel to a Napa Valley vineyard in a hot air balloon.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: After four weeks on the road, Gino's airing his feet in the back seat as the guys cruise along a Texan highway. Texas is a meat lover's paradise, and Gordon is keen to show the Europhiles some of the best BBQ known to man.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food adventure exploring Jakarta, a melting pot of diverse cultural cuisines, where he indulges in an Indonesian dessert, the sweet Martabak, known as the "King of Street Food".

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.desc: Frankie explores Hawaii's O'ahu island to get nourished from fresh tuna poke, heartfelt Pho, and hand-pounded poi.

programme.title: Worth the Hype
programme.sub-title: Quail, Alligator Sausage, & Gumbo in New Orleans
programme.desc: Frankie stops by New Orleans to chow down on lacquered quail, a beast of a Po Boy, and Creole Beef Daube.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie's soaking up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood. He cooks a stunning pork chop with peppers and alioli and a surf and turf skewer of prawns, mushrooms, and local ham.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie explores Tunisia to meet traditional couscous makers, eat delicious street food, and get invited to cook with local chefs on a beach. Inspired by everything he sees, Jamie cooks crispy prawn parcels and a chicken and merguez sausage stew.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Marseille in the south of France. Inspired by their stunning seafood, the traditional flavors of Provence, and the multicultural dishes being served up there, he cooks up a steak with a twist and a sublime courgette and olive tart.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Little Yellow Train winds through the Eastern Pyrenees, crossing the Cerdan plateau, the historic Gisclard railway suspension bridge and the Grandes Canalettes caves, known as the underground Versailles of the Pyrenees.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Corsica, the Island of Beauty, is best explored by railway; from Mediterranean waters to towering peaks, stops include Algajola for a seaside dive, Vizzavona on the GR20 trail and historic cities like Corte with its citadel.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express travels from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing sites like the Meteora peaks, Delphi ruins and the Acropolis; the journey continues to the Peloponnese on Greece's last cogwheel train.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Andalusia, now crossed by high-speed and modernized rail lines, unveils its rich culture and landscapes; along the journey, we visit cities like Seville, Granada with its famed Alhambra and Guadix near the Tabernas desert.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Portugal, in the Douro River Valley, a steam locomotive and a small historic train will take you in turn to the water's edge, on the only railroad line in the world that crosses three World Heritage Sites classified by UNESCO.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Cinque Terre Express runs along Italy's northern coast east of Genoa; passing through five UNESCO-listed villages, it offers coastal views and access to cobbled streets, harbors, terraced vineyards and pastel-colored houses.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Andalusia, now crossed by high-speed and modernized rail lines, unveils its rich culture and landscapes; along the journey, we visit cities like Seville, Granada with its famed Alhambra and Guadix near the Tabernas desert.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred start their road trip in Gino's homeland of Italy, where Gino needs help to pull off an event that is close to his heart. Gino collects Gordon and Fred in a campervan to begin a road trip they won't be forgetting in a hurry.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to France, where Fred has been asked to co-host an Oyster Festival in the beautiful Arcachon Bay, in just four days' time. Reunited with their campervan, Fred nominates himself as the driver in his homeland.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is taking spaghetti bolognese to the next level and re-creating a mind-blowing Jewish-Italian recipe. There's also beef stew with pappardelle.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie visits Basilicata in search of some old school Italian recipes and meets a family of shepherds and an 89-year-old macaroni master.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is high up in the Italian Alps cooking some great comfort food, including dumplings, mind-blowing macaroni cheese, and a classic red wine and sausage risotto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie tracks down some fast, fresh and easy recipes, featuring tasty minty pea tortiglioni and gnocchi with roasted tomato sauce and rocket pesto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie heads for one of the hottest food destinations in Italy, making hand-crafted pasta, a special seafood stew, and the region's answer to paella.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.sub-title: Best of Salina's Land and Sea
programme.desc: Jamie returns to cooking the food he loves the most, getting right to heart of the Italian kitchen.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie gets a masterclass in Sicilian sweets and cooking up an epic tuna, prawn and pistachio spaghetti. There's also some chocolaty cannoli.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie visits the pizza capital of Italy to learn recipes from the locals and tries acquapazza, fish poached in crazy water.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Go Greek! Clash of the Titans

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: Andy goes back to his home farm in Alabama for deer and quail hunting; he makes dishes with his former "Master Chef" contestant, Alex.

programme.title: Sail Kings
programme.desc: Capt. Jared travels to Venice, Louisiana, where the Mississippi River meets the Gulf, joining Capt. Garrett George and Capt. Jesse Leboeuf for an action-packed offshore adventure in pursuit of redfish and tuna.

programme.title: Ship Shape TV
programme.desc: Tips for making improvements and repairs on boats and boat equipment.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: A peaceful day of reef fishing in Islamorada turns into a kingfish and yellowtail frenzy for Captains Scott and Steve.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: It only takes three fish to fill the Yeti cooler when Capt. Scott kite fishes the top for wahoo and Steve pulls a big mutton snapper off the bottom.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Captains Scott and Steve take a long run into the Gulf from Stock Island to load their coolers with cobia and huge yellowtail snapper.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Captains Scott and Steve sail west of Key West to battle with big kingfish and end up with plenty of meat for the smoker.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.sub-title: Key West Yellowtail and Cero on Fly
programme.desc: Captains Steve Rodger and Scott Walker prove themselves to be among the top charter boat and tournament captains in offshore fishing; follow their journey to fishing destinations as they share the techniques that have driven their success.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.sub-title: Trolling Bonitas out of Key West
programme.desc: Captains Scott and Steve catch bonita for bait, slow-trolling them around wrecks to lure wahoo and kingfish.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Phillip Culpepper heads to Maryland to turkey hunt with Camospace Sweepstakes winner Brian Niblett; after a gobbler slips away off the roost, the guys only have a few more hours to get it done before the noon hunting cutoff.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: ORIGINAL CONTENT - Tyler and Colton Jordan go after the eastern bird in the quest for Colton's first ever Grand Slam. David Blanton also hunts the opening day and has 6 gobblers come into the decoy.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: Hunting Mouflon and Hybrid Kri Kri Ibex - Dugi Otok Island in Croatia
programme.desc: A Bird Hunter's Diary is Mark Peterson's quest to hunt and harvest the 43 different species of waterfowl; this quest takes him into three different countries, 8 states, and includes over 110 days in the field, all in one season.

programme.title: Upland Slam
programme.sub-title: Alaska Ptarmigan Day 2: The Journey Within; A Bird Hunters Diary

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun
programme.desc: With Meredith McCord halfway around the world, Capt. Justin Leake gives show producer Chris Hermans his first shot at landing a tarpon after filming them for nine seasons.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun
programme.desc: Capt. Justin Leake joins some old friends aboard the Fall Line in hopes of scoring big in the Bay Point Billfish Open. The trip will test the limits of all the anglers as the captain and crew do the impossible in hopes of bringing home the prize.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Highlighting the stories and people who have made the shooting sports and hunting lifestyle a part of their lives.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Highlighting the stories and people who have made the shooting sports and hunting lifestyle a part of their lives.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Spring in Michigan means turkey season is on. In this episode of Winchester Life, the crew returns for Turkey Camp 2025, where changing weather, early mornings.

programme.title: JUST SHOT: Heartland Bowhunter - Full Strut
programme.sub-title: Back-to-Back Gobblers! Skyler & Clayton Double Up!
programme.desc: Skyler & Clayton kicked off their 2024 Kansas Turkey Season, and it ended almost as quick as it started. Both of them tagged out in a hurry within the first few hunts. Some of the best 24 hours of turkey hunting they've ever experienced!

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.sub-title: Two More Turkeys Down in Mississippi!!!
programme.desc: Host and real estate agent, Slade Priest, educates on everything from purchasing and flipping hunting properties, to improving existing ones.

programme.title: Shoshone Adventures
programme.desc: Shoshone is proud to announce the launch of our own hunting operation in Kansas, offering premier waterfowl, whitetail, and turkey hunts. Kansas is widely regarded as one of the top destinations in the country for both waterfowl and whitetail.

programme.title: Shoshone Adventures
programme.desc: Join Johnathan Roberts of Shoshone Adventures as he chases big game in Costa Rica-two epic fishing trips targeting sailfish and a rare Marlin Superslam!

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: Andy and his son, Logan, visit the country of New Zealand; they explore vineyards, helicopter hunts and more.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: Andy and his friend Scotty take on Kodiak Island, Alaska for an adventure of salmon fishing and hunting black-tailed deer.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.sub-title: Obsessed with Gobbles - Texas Turkey Hunting
programme.desc: In this episode of Turkey POSSE, Will Cooper follows Hudson Lochte through the Texas Hill Country as the young gun chases hard gobbling longbeards and knocks down.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.sub-title: Texas Turkey: First Toms and a New Addiction

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Jeff Lindsey from "The Lindsey Way" is on a mission for one deer, a buck they call Junior; after passing him the year before, Jeff spends months trying to catch up with the elusive whitetail.

programme.title: Pure Hunting Short Films
programme.desc: Willi's reason for his workout commitment and the project came about after filming "Pure Hunting's" TV series.

programme.title: Pure Hunting Short Films
programme.desc: Willi and Chris are back in New Mexico, bowhunting elk; Willi shot poorly at a bull and, after discovering the cause, hopes for redemption as their hunting days end.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: Human-wildlife conflict is common in Borneo, where human populations are scattered throughout the landscape; Dan Cabela travels to the area to participate in an elephant collaring project showing how people and elephants can live harmoniously.
